display_name: RSI-OVERSOLD A/B: EXACT clone of badday_flush (50-500k microcap deep-flush rider) PLUS one added entry requirement — entry_rsi_15m_max=44 (15-min RSI oversold, raw_meta.rsi_15m computed live by tier2_features.compute_rsi_bb). Its A/B TWIN is badday_flush itself (same tokens, same sizing/caps/exits/family gates; the ONLY decision difference is this rsi gate). Validated NEW axis (adversarial: lifts winner-rate + forward-peak median two-sided, orthogonal to median_buy_size_usd, fires only in down-MTF — a refinement of the existing dip stack). FAIL-CLOSED on missing rsi (measures only tokens where the signal is observable; age>=6h universe reliably has 15m OHLC). Threshold overridable via env RSI_OVERSOLD_MAX. bot_id keeps the badday_ prefix DELIBERATELY: the prefix is load-bearing (grants the microcap-lane buy mandate + scopes the in_flight_floor exit and the lef/crk/fk/ppc/nd/wsz family entry gates) — only with it is this a true twin of badday_flush. PAPER-ONLY (no live key). Read the A/B off realized $/tr + forward-candle winner-rate per bot_id (badday_flush_rsi_ab vs badday_flush) once both reach n>=30 closes. [DAILY FLOOR $60 mirrors the control — only the rsi gate is the variable.]
